steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The word “painstakingly” is the decisive clue — it describes how Reiniger and her team worked, indicating effort and care. The supporting evidence (three years of work, 250,000+ individual images, repeatedly inventing new methods) all point to a demanding, exhausting undertaking.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”Arduous” means extremely difficult and tiring, which directly captures what “painstakingly” signals about the nature of the work.

Haphazard contradicts painstaking; ineffectual contradicts their demonstrated success in creating the film; and contentious introduces interpersonal conflict nowhere mentioned in the passage.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
